name: Chicken & Pasta Broth
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless, skinless chicken breasts (3 oz / 90 g each)
1 small red pepper, de-seeded and chopped
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
4 teaspoons grated parmesan cheese for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the chicken stock into a large saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Add the chicken breasts, peppercorns, bay leaf, and sprig of rosemary or thyme. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently for 15 minutes.
3. Using a slotted spoon, remove the chicken from the saucepan and set aside until cool enough to handle. Strain the stock through a fine-mesh sieve into the saucepan, reserving any strained solids.
4. Add the leeks, carrot, and macaroni to the stock in the saucepan. Return to a boil, then reduce heat, cover, and simmer gently for 15 minutes more until vegetables are tender.
5. Slice the chicken breasts into small pieces and add them back to the broth along with the red pepper. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes until vegetables are cooked through.
6. Stir in the chopped fresh thyme, season with salt and black pepper to taste.
7. Divide the broth among warm soup bowls and sprinkle each serving with a teaspoon of grated parmesan cheese.
